prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AO125IBPSSFGP-LG-BL Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 12.5 Inch Prospecting Large Sand Scoop Plastic Trowel for Metal Detector Gold Panning, Blue Description: The ASR Outdoor Heavy Duty Plastic Gold Panning Sand Scoop Trowel for Metal Detecting and Gold Pan Prospecting is a must-have gold panning essential to include in your prospectors kit of gold prospecting equipment, alongside a metal detector, sluice box, gold pans, classifier sieves and rock pick hammer, to help increase your gold recovery efforts.

Whether you're a seasoned gold prospector or just poking around in your local riverbed for the first time with friends or family, this plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel will help you to increase your gold recovery efforts, especially when used in conjunction with a metal detector.

The ASR Outdoor plastic gold rush gold panning gold prospecting sand scoop or shovel is made from reinforced, heavy duty, single-piece construction plastic; the shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-free, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come. In addition to the sand scoop's formidable construction, the shovel also boasts a bright and vibrant color. The vivid color choice is purposeful, as it will greatly aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot gold among other particles like sand, dirt and minerals.

And, when you're not using the gold panning tool alongside your gold rush sluice box, metal detector, gold pans, sieves and other gold prospecting equipment, the hand shovel can be used in your backyard for gardening purposes, or as a pooper scooper tool to pick up after pets like cats or dogs in your garden. The sand scoop trowel also includes a lanyard hole at the top of the handle, giving you many convenient carrying options Search Terms: hand trowel garden scoop paydirt scop candy scoop prospecting gold panning gold digger treasure hunting gardening hiking backpacking metal detecting green plastic sand scooper lightweight heavy duty plastic outdoor trowel Features: - GOLD PANNING SCOOP: An essential gold mining equipment tool for your gold panning kit. The plastic gold prospecting sand scoop shovel will help in your gold recovery efforts, especially when used in conjunction with a metal detector or when metal detecting - HEAVY DUTY PLASTIC: Ideal for Metal Detecting, this reinforced, heavy duty, single piece construction plastic sand scoop is non metallic, will not rust or set off any false positive readings, allowing you to use and reuse the tool for many seasons to come - BRIGHT VIBRANT COLOR: The vibrant bright color of the gold prospecting shovel sand scoop will help aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot and gold among other particles like sand, dirt and minerals - MULTI PURPOSE TOOL: When not using the ASR Outdoor gold rush shovel sand scoop for gold panning, you can utilize in your backyard for gardening purposes or as a pooper scooper tool to pick up after pets like cats or dogs in your garden - SAND SCOOPER SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 12.5 inches; Weight: 3.5oz; Includes lanyard hole for multiple carrying options; Color: Blue === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12.5in Blue Gold Panning Sand Scoop

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 12.5 in Blue Plastic Sand Scoop Trowel

anthropic.title_differentiation: Heavy Duty Plastic, Non-Metallic, Metal Detecting Compatible, Rust-Free, Multi-Purpose Garden Tool
